title: Brand-voice copy generation output (Phase 6.7)
description: Generates the human-facing prose blocks that frame design.md: a one-sentence brand thesis, a three-bullet voice profile, and section blurbs keyed by the canonical design.md section anchors. No design tokens are emitted here — pure writing.

brandThesis.description: Single sentence that captures what this product/brand is and how it presents itself. Surfaces at the top of design.md.

trait.description: Short adjective or noun phrase, e.g. 'Confident', 'Plainspoken', 'Builder-first'.

voiceProfile.description: Three to five voice traits with one-sentence justifications, evidenced from the harvested copy + screenshots.

section.description: Canonical design.md section anchor the blurb belongs to.

sectionBlurbs.description: Section-level intros that explain the harvested system in brand voice. Tone must match voiceProfile.
